canonical_name: Biju Swasthya Kalyan Yojana / Gopabandhu Jan Arogya Yojana (Odisha)

local_names.hi: बीजू स्वास्थ्य कल्याण योजना / गोपबंधु जन आरोग्य योजना (ओडिशा)
local_names.bn: বিজু স্বাস্থ্য কল্যাণ যোজনা / গোপবন্ধু জন আরোগ্য যোজনা (ওড়িশা)
local_names.ta: பிஜு ஸ்வாஸ்த்ய கல்யாண் யோஜனா / கோபபந்து ஜன் ஆரோக்ய யோஜனா (ஒடிசா)
local_names.te: బిజు స్వాస్థ్య కల్యాణ్ యోజన / గోపబంధు జన ఆరోగ్య యోజన (ఒడిశా)
local_names.mr: बीजू स्वास्थ्य कल्याण योजना / गोपबंधु जन आरोग्य योजना (ओडिशा)
local_names.gu: બિજુ સ્વાસ્થ્ય કલ્યાણ યોજના / ગોપબંધુ જન આરોગ્ય યોજના (ઓડિશા)
local_names.kn: ಬಿಜು ಸ್ವಾಸ್ಥ್ಯ ಕಲ್ಯಾಣ ಯೋಜನೆ / ಗೋಪಬಂಧು ಜನ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಯೋಜನೆ (ಒಡಿಶಾ)
local_names.ml: ബിജു സ്വാസ്ഥ്യ കല്യാണ്‍ യോജന / ഗോപബന്ധു ജന്‍ ആരോഗ്യ യോജന (ഒഡിഷ)
local_names.pa: ਬੀਜੂ ਸਵਾਸਥ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਯੋਜਨਾ / ਗੋਪਬੰਧੂ ਜਨ ਆਰੋਗਿਆ ਯੋਜਨਾ (ਓਡੀਸ਼ਾ)
local_names.or: ବିଜୁ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କଲ୍ୟାଣ ଯୋଜନା / ଗୋପବନ୍ଧୁ ଜନ ଆରୋଗ୍ୟ ଯୋଜନା (ଓଡ଼ିଶା)

income_thresholds.description: No income threshold for NFSA/SFSS ration card holders who are auto-enrolled. Covers ~90% of Odisha population. Non-NFSA families can also enroll.
income_thresholds.source: BSKY / Gopabandhu Jan Arogya Guidelines / Odisha Government Notification

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Odisha with valid state-issued ration card or domicile proof are eligible
Families without NFSA/SFSS ration card need to apply through district administration for enrollment
BSKY card is issued in the name of the woman head of household; male-headed households need to designate a woman member

family_criteria.family_definition: All members listed on the NFSA/SFSS ration card are covered. No cap on family size. BSKY card issued in the name of the woman head of household. Women members get enhanced coverage of Rs 10 lakh per year.

covered_procedures: Cardiology (bypass surgery, angioplasty, valve replacement, pacemaker)
Orthopedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, spinal surgery, fracture fixation)
Oncology (chemotherapy, radiation therapy, surgical oncology, bone marrow transplant)
Neurosurgery (brain tumor surgery, craniotomy, spinal cord procedures)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization
Enhanced coverage for women members: Rs 10 lakh (Rs 1000000) for all listed procedures

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for biometric/OTP-based e-KYC at empanelled hospital

required_documents.name: Ration Card (Odisha NFSA/SFSS)
required_documents.notes: NFSA or SFSS ration card for auto-enrollment; other ration card types also accepted. Covers ~90% state population.

required_documents.name: BSKY Smart Health Card
required_documents.notes: BSKY smart card issued in woman's name; Aadhaar-based e-KYC also accepted

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: For OTP verification and scheme communication

required_documents.name: Address Proof
required_documents.notes: Odisha residency verification; ration card usually serves this purpose

enrollment_steps: Step 1: NFSA/SFSS ration card holders are auto-enrolled; check status on bsky.odisha.gov.in or call 155369
Step 2: Collect BSKY Smart Health Card (issued in woman's name) from nearest distribution camp or Mo Seva Kendra
Step 3: If not auto-enrolled, visit Block office or Mo Seva Kendra with Aadhaar and ration card
Step 4: Complete Aadhaar-based e-KYC for card generation
Step 5: BSKY Smart Card generated with QR code for all family members
Step 6: For treatment, visit any BSKY-empanelled hospital (in Odisha or designated out-of-state hospitals)
Step 7: Cashless treatment after pre-authorization; women automatically get Rs 10 lakh coverage; scheme now joined PM-JAY since Jan 2025
description_for_embedding: Biju Swasthya Kalyan Yojana (BSKY) / Gopabandhu Jan Arogya Yojana is Odisha's near-universal health insurance scheme providing Rs 5 lakh (Rs 500000) per family per year for hospitalization, with enhanced coverage of Rs 10 lakh (Rs 1000000) per year for WOMEN members. NFSA/SFSS ration card holders (~90% of the state population) are auto-enrolled with no income threshold. The BSKY card is issued in the woman's name. Odisha joined PM-JAY in January 2025 integrating both central and state benefits. The scheme covers over 1000 medical and surgical procedures at empanelled hospitals within Odisha and designated out-of-state hospitals. Completely free with no premium. Helpline: 155369. Portal: bsky.odisha.gov.in.
